title.en: At this moment, he was already injured.

content.en:
"Finally got it!"

The Overlord of Qingshan grabbed dozens of balls of Void Golden Water, although there were still some Void Golden Water, but in order to snatch these Void Golden Water, he had to resist the attacks of these Void Golden Spirits to snatch it.

At this moment, he was already injured.

"Let's go!"

The Overlord of Qingshan directly chose to leave, after all, if he fell into it and could not escape, then there was a possibility of falling.

No matter how great the value of the Void Golden Water is, it won't make him give up his life!

With the escape of the Qingshan Overlord, these overlords were also panicked, in case those Void Golden Spirits attacked them, they would not be able to stop them!

Those Void Golden Spirits who had not yet been taken away from the Void Golden Water were still staying near their Void Golden Water at the moment, but some of the Void Golden Water had been taken away by the Overlord of Qingshan, but the Void Golden Spirits had not been killed.

These Void Golden Spirits were quickly killed, and they fell into a frenzy, wanting to kill the overlords present.

Fortunately, these Void Golden Spirits now have very little power of Void Gold and Water, and most of them are still using the power of Void Silver Water, so their strength is not as strong as before, but it is also much more powerful than many overlords.

Soon, there will be overlords who are unlucky!

Bang!!!

An overlord who was at the peak of the second stage was directly locked through his body by the five Void Golden Spirits, and his body suddenly collapsed, his will was annihilated, and he turned into a corpse.

"Run!"

The Void Whale Overlord didn't dare to stay here either.

He chose to flee directly, but fortunately, he also obtained a lot of Void Silver Water, so the harvest of this trip was not bad.

In the blink of an eye, the overlords here have fled.

Only two overlords were a little unlucky and were killed, and the other overlords only suffered some injuries and their lives were not in serious danger.

And with the fall of these two overlords, their territory will soon be divided, but it will not affect the overall pattern of the Voidless Galaxy.

......

"Hahaha, I have gained a lot this time, and fortunately, I have condensed immeasurable blood and stepped into the third level, so I can obtain so much Void Silver Water!"

The Void Whale Overlord said excitedly.

He counted that he had obtained a total of 1,300 regiments of Void Silver Water this time, although it could not be compared with the harvest of the Qingshan Overlord, after all, the Qingshan Overlord had harvested the Void Golden Water, and the two were not comparable at all!

No matter how much Void Silver Water there is, it can't help a third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform to impact the fourth stage, but the Void Golden Water can help impact the fourth stage.

And not long after, this treasure land was also exposed, and the overlords who had not come also rushed in, and even the powerhouses outside the Voidless Galaxy also came here, constantly snatching the Void Silver Water.

And the Void Whale Overlord has also entered many times, but they all enter with the large army, otherwise he would not dare to enter.

At the beginning, the harvest was not bad, but later on, the amount of Void Silver Water was greatly reduced, and it was even impossible to find it.

And a large number of Void Silver Spirits and Void Gold Spirits in that treasure land were also killed, and the entire treasure land turned into a real void area, leaving nothing left.

Of course, after a long time, there may be some Void Silver Water and Void Gold Water born there.

......

Another period of time has passed.

At this time, Ye Tiancai knew about the Void Silver Water.

After all, he didn't have a hegemon-level copy body, and he didn't know the information between the overlords, and the overlords tried their best to block the news, resulting in his copy body not knowing the situation in time.

When the news was really understood by the other creatures of the Voidless Galaxy, there was no Void Silver Water there.

In fact, even if they knew the information, those creatures of the empty galaxy would not dare to enter it, otherwise they would be sent to death.

After all, there are more than one or two overlords who have fallen this time, and any overlord is at least a high-level immeasurable lifeform at the peak of the second stage, no matter how powerful it is, it still fell there.

"The value of the Void Silver Water is very high, and when I step into the third stage and condense immeasurable blood, although the Hailou Heavenly Gold is also useful, the effect is far inferior to the Void Silver Water. Moreover, there is also Void Gold Water on top of the Void Silver Water, and my ability to fuse all things should be able to fuse the Void Silver Water into Void Gold Water. The value of a cloud of Void Gold Water is even more terrifying, far surpassing that of Void Silver Water!"

Ye Tian muttered.

According to his understanding, the Void Golden Water could not only help the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the third stage to impact the fourth stage, but also had a special use.

That is, the Void Golden Water can improve the quality of immeasurable blood, which is a secret that many high-level immeasurable lifeforms know, but no one will improve the quality of immeasurable blood, because the price is too great.

How rare the Void Golden Water is, even a high-level immeasurable lifeform like the Overlord of Qingshan Mountain is difficult to collect the Void Golden Water that allows it to impact the fourth stage, and it takes endless years to collect it slowly, so it is naturally impossible to waste the Void Golden Water to improve the quality of the Immeasurable Blood.

1296,000,000 drops of immeasurable blood, all to improve the quality, how much Void Gold Water do you have to pay?

No matter what kind of big force it is, it can't afford to consume such resources!

In the immeasurable bone stage, some big forces gritted their teeth, and they could also cultivate a high-level immeasurable lifeform that refined the immeasurable bone to the limit, but in the immeasurable blood stage, if they still did this, they really couldn't do it.

Ye Tian didn't know how much Void Gold Water he would need to refine the immeasurable blood at that time, but it was definitely a terrifying number, so it was best to collect some Void Silver Water at this time.

"The Void Silver Water is useful to the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the third stage, and the value is higher than that of the Hailou Tianjin, but those overlords who are at the peak of the second stage cannot use the Void Silver Water, they may be willing to trade some Void Silver Water in exchange for the Hailou Heavenly Gold. However, I can't come forward, it's better to let the Void Whale Overlord come and buy the Void Silver Water instead of me!" Ye Tian thought.

So, Ye Tian contacted the Void Whale Overlord.

......

"The outsider contacted me!"

The Void Whale Overlord thought about whether to see Ye Tian again.

He has now condensed immeasurable blood, and has obtained a lot of Void Silver Water, so he doesn't need Hailou Heavenly Gold very much.

Hailou Tianjin is most suitable for the second-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, while Void Silver Water is most suitable for the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Therefore, he will not trade Hailou Tianjin again.

Then, there is no point in trading with Ye Tian again!

"Forget it, let's go see him again, if he doesn't have a good deal, then don't meet him again. It's not a good thing to meet these outsiders!" said the Void Whale Overlord secretly.

Not long after, Ye Tian and the Void Whale Overlord met again.
